original: a pair of shield-boosting breast implants
context: <<POS:00000925>> ase(e.longName)),e.description='a pair of shield-boosting breast implants'

original: Developed by Paragon Inc. to improve the endurance of its soldiers in the battlefield, these breast implants are filled with miniature kinetic generators and shield field emitters suspended in a hardlight-compatible silicone slurry. They provide additional shields, allowing troops to fight longer.\n\nSo far their only drawback seems to be the inherent size increase resulting in a perception of sexual arousal and depravity by the user, as their breasts never shrink down to a more socially-expected size.
